system.Text:
__When you secure an area while on an expedition__, after doing any of the following...
* overcoming a critical obstacle
* gaining meaningful insight
* defeating a notable foe

...envision how can you make this a perpetual safe place to rest. Then, roll +wits.

On a __strong hit__, you make a reliable haven. Name it and mark the progress box in which this haven is being established.

Then, when you...
* @Compendium[ancient-wonders.ancientwondersmoves.Item.fvxIsI6u73hkrK6J]{Hunker Down} in this haven: Add +2 and choose an additional option on a hit.
* @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition} from this haven: Add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
*  Go to the haven by...
  -  Returning to it in the middle of an expedition: Clear all progress after the haven
  -  Starting a new expedition route: @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ed490d43a2533506]{Set a Course} and add +2

On a __weak hit__, as above, but making this haven causes a delay or setback. Choose one. 
* @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-3).
*  Clear one progress box and mark the haven appropriately.

On a __miss__, this place is cursed. You find no comfort in it. @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.
